description: Unified branded gradient header with integrated Discovery Spark across all admin pages (Dashboard, All Requests CPT, Settings). Version bump 2.0.2 to 2.0.3.
steps: Create shared helper function zcrb_admin_branded_header() that outputs gradient header with Discovery Spark integrated inside (to left of title text)
Update class-zcrb-admin-hub.php to use the shared helper, remove separate .zcrb-hub-spark section
Update class-zcrb-settings.php render_page() to add branded header at top
Add all_admin_notices hook to inject header on CPT screens (edit.php?post_type=zcrb_request and post.php editing a zcrb_request)
Extend enqueue_assets to load zcrb-admin.css on CPT screens
Update CSS to style the integrated spark within the header
Version bump 2.0.2 to 2.0.3 in all 4 pointer files
acceptance_criteria: Branded header with Discovery Spark appears on Dashboard, All Requests, and Settings pages
Discovery Spark is inside the header (to the left of title), not a separate panel below
All PHP files pass syntax check
findings: v2.3.1 layout refactor completed: Removed vertical sidebar, replaced with horizontal header bar (Spark + title + version badge) + horizontal tab nav (Dashboard / All Requests / Settings). Full-width content area. Added redirect_cpt_list() to block raw CPT list table. Fixed search icon spacing and status tab nowrap scrolling. JS updated from .zcrb-nav-item to .zcrb-tab selectors. All 20 PHP files pass syntax check. Zip rebuilt.
